top_signals.title: The ETF market is pushing the limits of the leverage it can handle. SK Hynix is the latest example
top_signals.summary: The original ETF boom was about low cost, tax-efficient core index funds. Now single-stock ETFs are upping risk, with leverage getting 'a little carried away.'
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.

top_signals.title: China's Nexchip has global ambitions as legacy chips thrive in AI's shadow
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: The superpower of public equity
top_signals.summary: Liquidity is tempting companies back to the public markets — but it is not available to all
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
